svg.text: Mobile-only SVG concepts using the app's current premium emerald, cyan, dark glass, and Daily Challenge language.

g.text: Closest to Daily Challenge: cinematic top card, strong first capsule, premium queue feeling.
What's one thing you never admit?
Send proof before the timer ends.
Most readable: like Messages, dares feel like urgent conversations with action states.
Cleanest: Search screen style, compact filter/search capsule, more controlled and professional.
Most app-specific: dares feel like premium tasks, with status as the visual driver.
Best match for your app: Direction 1 or 2. Direction 1 feels closest to Daily Challenge. Direction 2 is the most usable for a received/sent inbox.
Direction 3 is the safest professional UI. Direction 4 is more unique and task-driven, but it changes the personality of the screen the most.
Recommendation: hybrid of 1 + 2. Use the Daily Inbox Hero at the top, then Chat Stack cards below, keeping existing data and sorting untouched.
